channel.title: Xiaomi 12 Lite MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater
channel.description: Your best website to track MIUI ROM releases!

image.title: Xiaomi 12 Lite MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater

item.title: MIUI OS1.0.37.0.ULIEUXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 12 Lite EEA
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 12 Lite EEA

Codename: taoyao

Version: OS1.0.37.0.ULIEUXM | 14.0

Size: 6.8 GB

MD5: e713e93c024647358ef1dc5a667fa8ba

Changelog:
[System]
Updated the security patch to February 2026. Increased system security.

Download: Here
